assumptions.message: Baseline, reactive, and coating scenarios are run against one resolved weather dataset and one immutable exogenous event tape.
Scenario ranking uses T4 net_annual_benefit_sar after reconciliation.
Comparison CSV and recommendation outputs include ROI/payback fields computed as incremental mitigation economics versus baseline.

assumptions.rationale: Central-v2 tuning keeps sparse-rain event physics while targeting about 25% annual no-clean loss for the 2025 full-year fixture.
assumptions.source: SolarClean Phase 3.5 provisional presets; Kimber et al. 2006 PV soiling model; Ilse et al. 2019 Joule soiling-economics review, https://doi.org/10.1016/j.joule.2019.08.019

assumptions.rationale: Documents the annual no-clean loss target used to tune runtime soiling parameters without hardcoding an output.
assumptions.source: T6 parameter audit correction, 2026-07-06; target range selected for Riyadh central mitigation comparison.

assumptions.rationale: Separates full-farm survey cadence from lower-level cohort inspection counts.
assumptions.source: T6 parameter audit correction, 2026-07-06; central annual survey cadence for whole-farm UAV inspection.

assumptions.rationale: Keeps annual drone workload visible separately from cohort-level inspection event counts.
assumptions.source: T6 parameter audit correction, 2026-07-06; central reactive inspection workload target.

assumptions.rationale: Provides the central-v2 provisional recall input for T2 reactive CV sensitivity.
assumptions.source: DeepSolarEye and PV image-inspection literature; exact production CV model not yet selected.

assumptions.rationale: Documents the central 4% estimated-loss trigger used by the reactive controller.
assumptions.source: T6 parameter audit correction, 2026-07-06; reactive cleaning trigger for central comparison.

assumptions.rationale: Captures wet-cleaning water demand without implementing dispatch behavior.
assumptions.source: PV cleaning literature and arid-site water-use envelopes; water-free cleaning alternatives noted separately.

assumptions.rationale: Central-v2 reactive CV comparison uses a 150,000 SAR drone/camera/battery equipment CAPEX.
assumptions.source: Manufacturer-class UAV specification context and market-price sensitivity envelope; no binding quote.

assumptions.rationale: Prevents reactive supervision/software/maintenance overhead from being silently unpriced.
assumptions.source: T6 parameter audit correction, 2026-07-06; explicit annual OPEX target for reactive CV operations.

assumptions.rationale: Documents the central coating residual annual loss target without hardcoding final annual output.
assumptions.source: T6 parameter audit correction, 2026-07-06; central residual-loss target for the front-surface anti-soiling coating case.

assumptions.rationale: Represents a mechanistic 30% reduction in new dust accumulation; runtime multiplier is 1 - this value.
assumptions.source: Hydrophobic/nanotextured self-cleaning coating studies and arid PV coating reviews; not the paper endpoint ratio by itself.

assumptions.rationale: Stores the direct runtime multiplier used by CoatingPhysicsConfig.
assumptions.source: Calculated as 1 - coating.dust_adhesion_reduction_fraction for central-v2 T6 runtime configuration.

assumptions.rationale: Records the -1% to +2% optical sensitivity range while central runtime remains near neutral.
assumptions.source: T6 parameter audit correction, 2026-07-06; conservative optical sensitivity for transparent front-surface coating.

assumptions.rationale: Documents the total installed central-v2 coating CAPEX consumed by the full-year T6 config.
assumptions.source: T6 parameter audit correction, 2026-07-06; installed front-surface anti-soiling coating cost target.

assumptions.rationale: Documents central-v2 annual coating OPEX reserve consumed by T6 economics.
assumptions.source: T6 parameter audit correction, 2026-07-06; coating inspection/maintenance reserve target.

assumptions.rationale: Annualizes coating CAPEX over coating useful life instead of the generic 15-year economic horizon.
assumptions.source: T6 parameter audit correction, 2026-07-06; front-surface anti-soiling coating replacement interval.

assumptions.rationale: Central-v2 uses 0.18 SAR/kWh with sensitivity up to 0.30 SAR/kWh.
assumptions.source: Saudi electricity tariff references from SEC/WERA public tariff material; current tariff must be refreshed before decision use.
Saudi electricity tariff references from SEC/WERA public tariff material; current tariff must be refreshed before decision use.
Saudi labor-market wage references and cleaning-contractor uncertainty envelope.
Saudi National Water Company tariff references and arid-site delivered-water uncertainty.
Manufacturer-class UAV specification context and market-price sensitivity envelope; no binding quote.
T6 parameter audit correction, 2026-07-06; placeholder for pilot, battery-cycle, maintenance, and consumables per flight hour.
T6 parameter audit correction, 2026-07-06; explicit annual OPEX target for reactive CV operations.
Saudi Central Bank rate context and project-finance sensitivity practice.
PV asset-life convention and mitigation-equipment sensitivity envelope.

message: No recommendation produced because reconciliation failed.

parameter_registry_metadata.climate_context: Hot arid Gulf interior site using Asia/Riyadh daily aggregation.
parameter_registry_metadata.scope_note: The sole runtime configuration is configs/default.yaml. Low and high registry values are consumed programmatically by sensitivity analysis rather than duplicated as YAML overlays.

parameter_registry_parameters.applicability_to_saudi_conditions: Comparable dry, dusty operating context but not a measured Riyadh site soiling station.
parameter_registry_parameters.limitations: Needs measured clean/reference cell or measured production calibration at the target farm.
parameter_registry_parameters.name: soiling.base_daily_loss_fraction
parameter_registry_parameters.rationale: Central-v2 tuning keeps sparse-rain event physics while targeting about 25% annual no-clean loss for the 2025 full-year fixture.
parameter_registry_parameters.source: SolarClean Phase 3.5 provisional presets; Kimber et al. 2006 PV soiling model; Ilse et al. 2019 Joule soiling-economics review, https://doi.org/10.1016/j.joule.2019.08.019
parameter_registry_parameters.source_geography_and_climate: Southwestern United States and global arid PV evidence; Riyadh 2025 weather context.

parameter_registry_parameters.applicability_to_saudi_conditions: Used to prevent the central case from becoming a severe no-clean stress test.
parameter_registry_parameters.limitations: Must be replaced by measured soiling/reference-cell data before decision use.
parameter_registry_parameters.name: soiling.no_clean_annual_loss_target_fraction
parameter_registry_parameters.rationale: Documents the annual no-clean loss target used to tune runtime soiling parameters without hardcoding an output.
parameter_registry_parameters.source: T6 parameter audit correction, 2026-07-06; target range selected for Riyadh central mitigation comparison.
parameter_registry_parameters.source_geography_and_climate: Riyadh hot-arid central planning target, not a measured soiling-station result.

parameter_registry_parameters.applicability_to_saudi_conditions: Useful for preventing physically impossible accumulation while stress-testing Saudi dry seasons.
parameter_registry_parameters.limitations: Should be replaced by measured saturation behavior for local dust mineralogy and cleaning cadence.
parameter_registry_parameters.name: soiling.minimum_soiling_ratio
parameter_registry_parameters.rationale: Bounds the floor of the empirical soiling ratio under prolonged dry contamination.
parameter_registry_parameters.source: SolarClean Phase 3.5 stress-test bounds derived from baseline model sensitivity needs.
parameter_registry_parameters.source_geography_and_climate: Model guardrail rather than a directly measured climate result.

parameter_registry_parameters.applicability_to_saudi_conditions: Needed for Saudi sensitivity runs, but not yet fitted to Riyadh observations.
parameter_registry_parameters.limitations: Requires local soiling station data or production residual analysis.
parameter_registry_parameters.name: soiling.stochastic_std_fraction
parameter_registry_parameters.rationale: Controls daily random variation around the dry-weather soiling rate.
parameter_registry_parameters.source: SolarClean event-tape design and Phase 3.5 provisional Riyadh presets.
parameter_registry_parameters.source_geography_and_climate: No site measurement; uncertainty placeholder for arid daily dust variability.

parameter_registry_parameters.applicability_to_saudi_conditions: Spring dust enhancement is plausible for Riyadh but site-year variability is high.
parameter_registry_parameters.limitations: Does not distinguish synoptic dust storms, local construction dust, or farm microclimate.
parameter_registry_parameters.name: seasonality.march_multiplier
parameter_registry_parameters.rationale: Raises March dry accumulation during the regional dust season.
parameter_registry_parameters.source: Saudi and Gulf dust climatology evidence summarized in source bibliography; SolarClean Phase 3.5 preset.
parameter_registry_parameters.source_geography_and_climate: Saudi/Gulf spring dust season, hot arid climate.

parameter_registry_parameters.applicability_to_saudi_conditions: April often falls within regional dust-season conditions relevant to Riyadh.
parameter_registry_parameters.limitations: Needs local measured dust deposition or aerosol optical depth regression.
parameter_registry_parameters.name: seasonality.april_multiplier
parameter_registry_parameters.rationale: Uses the strongest seasonal central uplift in the current preset family.
parameter_registry_parameters.source: Saudi and Gulf dust climatology evidence summarized in source bibliography; SolarClean Phase 3.5 preset.
parameter_registry_parameters.source_geography_and_climate: Saudi/Gulf spring dust season, hot arid climate.

parameter_registry_parameters.applicability_to_saudi_conditions: Reasonable provisional uplift for Riyadh pending measured deposition.
parameter_registry_parameters.limitations: Does not yet reflect year-specific dust-storm counts.
parameter_registry_parameters.name: seasonality.may_multiplier
parameter_registry_parameters.rationale: Extends the spring dust-season uplift into May.
parameter_registry_parameters.source: Saudi and Gulf dust climatology evidence summarized in source bibliography; SolarClean Phase 3.5 preset.
parameter_registry_parameters.source_geography_and_climate: Saudi/Gulf spring to early-summer dust season, hot arid climate.

parameter_registry_parameters.applicability_to_saudi_conditions: Represents localized heavy soiling days, not official dust-storm warning frequency.
parameter_registry_parameters.limitations: Must be calibrated against measured dust events or quality-controlled visibility/PM observations.
parameter_registry_parameters.name: dust_events.daily_probability
parameter_registry_parameters.rationale: Generates a plausible stress-test range for event-tape comparability.
parameter_registry_parameters.source: SolarClean Phase 3.5 provisional event-tape presets; Saudi/Gulf dust-storm climatology evidence.
parameter_registry_parameters.source_geography_and_climate: Saudi and Gulf arid dust-event context.

parameter_registry_parameters.applicability_to_saudi_conditions: A conservative lower event loss for Saudi sensitivity studies.
parameter_registry_parameters.limitations: Needs event-specific before/after power or soiling-ratio measurements.
parameter_registry_parameters.name: dust_events.loss_min_fraction
parameter_registry_parameters.rationale: Defines the lower bound of the stochastic heavy-dust event loss range.
parameter_registry_parameters.source: SolarClean Phase 3.5 provisional event-tape presets; PV soiling literature envelopes.
parameter_registry_parameters.source_geography_and_climate: Arid PV soiling evidence, not a measured Riyadh event distribution.

parameter_registry_parameters.applicability_to_saudi_conditions: Captures severe Saudi dust-event sensitivity without hard-coding an extreme.
parameter_registry_parameters.limitations: Storm severity, dust chemistry, tilt, and cleaning history can make this nonstationary.
parameter_registry_parameters.name: dust_events.loss_max_fraction
parameter_registry_parameters.rationale: Defines the upper bound of the stochastic heavy-dust event loss range.
parameter_registry_parameters.source: SolarClean Phase 3.5 provisional event-tape presets; PV soiling literature envelopes.
parameter_registry_parameters.source_geography_and_climate: Arid PV soiling evidence, not a measured Riyadh event distribution.

parameter_registry_parameters.applicability_to_saudi_conditions: Riyadh rain is infrequent; partial cleaning threshold remains a sensitivity parameter.
parameter_registry_parameters.limitations: Rain intensity, mud formation, and dust mineralogy may reverse or weaken cleaning.
parameter_registry_parameters.name: rainfall.partial_threshold_mm
parameter_registry_parameters.rationale: Triggers partial natural cleaning from light rainfall.
parameter_registry_parameters.source: SolarClean Phase 3.5 provisional rainfall presets; Kimber-style rainfall reset concept.
parameter_registry_parameters.source_geography_and_climate: PV soiling models from arid and semi-arid climates.

parameter_registry_parameters.applicability_to_saudi_conditions: Useful first-order threshold for rare stronger Riyadh rainfall events.
parameter_registry_parameters.limitations: Must be checked against measured soiling recovery after Riyadh rain events.
parameter_registry_parameters.name: rainfall.full_threshold_mm
parameter_registry_parameters.rationale: Triggers strong natural cleaning in the empirical model.
parameter_registry_parameters.source: SolarClean Phase 3.5 provisional rainfall presets; Kimber-style rainfall reset concept.
parameter_registry_parameters.source_geography_and_climate: PV soiling models from arid and semi-arid climates.

parameter_registry_parameters.applicability_to_saudi_conditions: Broad sensitivity bound for Saudi light-rain cleaning.
parameter_registry_parameters.limitations: No local rain-wash validation; light rain can leave residue.
parameter_registry_parameters.name: rainfall.partial_efficiency
parameter_registry_parameters.rationale: Restores part of the gap from current soiled state to clean state.
parameter_registry_parameters.source: SolarClean Phase 3.5 provisional rainfall presets.
parameter_registry_parameters.source_geography_and_climate: Arid PV natural-cleaning placeholder.

parameter_registry_parameters.applicability_to_saudi_conditions: Broad sensitivity bound for rare strong Saudi rain events.
parameter_registry_parameters.limitations: Rain chemistry and post-rain dust can reduce effectiveness.
parameter_registry_parameters.name: rainfall.full_efficiency
parameter_registry_parameters.rationale: Allows strong rainfall to nearly reset dust soiling without exceeding the clean state.
parameter_registry_parameters.source: SolarClean Phase 3.5 provisional rainfall presets.
parameter_registry_parameters.source_geography_and_climate: Arid PV natural-cleaning placeholder.

parameter_registry_parameters.applicability_to_saudi_conditions: Placeholder only; actual rate depends on site ecology and deterrence.
parameter_registry_parameters.limitations: Requires site observation logs or image-based event counts.
parameter_registry_parameters.name: bird.event_probability_per_cohort_day
parameter_registry_parameters.rationale: Maintains sparse localized biological soiling in cohort simulations.
parameter_registry_parameters.source: SolarClean Phase 3 provisional sparse bird-dropping model; PV soiling literature notes localized biological soiling.
parameter_registry_parameters.source_geography_and_climate: No Saudi bird-dropping rate source identified for utility PV cohorts.

parameter_registry_parameters.applicability_to_saudi_conditions: Small localized coverage lower bound for cohort-level modeling.
parameter_registry_parameters.limitations: Current model is not a per-cell bypass-diode electrical model.
parameter_registry_parameters.name: bird.coverage_min_fraction
parameter_registry_parameters.rationale: Sets the lower coverage sampled for one bird-dropping event.
parameter_registry_parameters.source: SolarClean Phase 3 provisional cohort bird-dropping model.
parameter_registry_parameters.source_geography_and_climate: No Saudi utility PV measurement found.

parameter_registry_parameters.applicability_to_saudi_conditions: Stress-tests localized biological soiling for Saudi sites.
parameter_registry_parameters.limitations: Should be replaced by image-derived coverage distributions.
parameter_registry_parameters.name: bird.coverage_max_fraction
parameter_registry_parameters.rationale: Sets the upper coverage sampled for one bird-dropping event.
parameter_registry_parameters.source: SolarClean Phase 3 provisional cohort bird-dropping model.
parameter_registry_parameters.source_geography_and_climate: No Saudi utility PV measurement found.

parameter_registry_parameters.applicability_to_saudi_conditions: Only a coarse aggregate mapping until T2/T3 owners add better electrical loss modeling.
parameter_registry_parameters.limitations: Bypass diode layout and string topology can make real losses nonlinear.
parameter_registry_parameters.name: bird.loss_per_coverage_fraction
parameter_registry_parameters.rationale: Maps cohort coverage additions to a cohort energy-loss fraction.
parameter_registry_parameters.source: SolarClean Phase 3 provisional cohort bird-dropping model; PV partial-shading literature warns nonlinear local losses.
parameter_registry_parameters.source_geography_and_climate: Generic PV partial-obstruction context.

parameter_registry_parameters.applicability_to_saudi_conditions: Rainfall is infrequent in Riyadh, so sensitivity is mostly event-specific.
parameter_registry_parameters.limitations: No local wash-off or persistence experiment identified.
parameter_registry_parameters.name: bird.rain_removal_efficiency
parameter_registry_parameters.rationale: Allows rainfall to remove part of bird-dropping coverage.
parameter_registry_parameters.source: SolarClean Phase 3 provisional cohort bird-dropping model.
parameter_registry_parameters.source_geography_and_climate: Generic PV cleaning placeholder.

parameter_registry_parameters.applicability_to_saudi_conditions: Potentially important during long dry Riyadh periods.
parameter_registry_parameters.limitations: Requires T1/core agreement before adding to SolarCleanConfig.
parameter_registry_parameters.name: bird.persistence_days_without_rain
parameter_registry_parameters.rationale: The current model has rain removal but no explicit dry persistence decay path.
parameter_registry_parameters.source: Interface placeholder derived from the current absence of explicit bird persistence controls.
parameter_registry_parameters.source_geography_and_climate: No Saudi utility PV persistence source identified.

parameter_registry_parameters.applicability_to_saudi_conditions: Saudi dust color, glare, and drone altitude may change detector recall.
parameter_registry_parameters.limitations: Needs T2 model evaluation on Saudi or Saudi-like imagery.
parameter_registry_parameters.name: cv.true_positive_rate
parameter_registry_parameters.rationale: Provides the central-v2 provisional recall input for T2 reactive CV sensitivity.
parameter_registry_parameters.source: DeepSolarEye and PV image-inspection literature; exact production CV model not yet selected.
parameter_registry_parameters.source_geography_and_climate: Mostly lab, rooftop, or public-image PV datasets outside Saudi Arabia.

parameter_registry_parameters.applicability_to_saudi_conditions: Dust haze, specular reflection, and sand color can increase false alarms.
parameter_registry_parameters.limitations: Cannot be validated until T2 publishes detector outputs and test data.
parameter_registry_parameters.name: cv.false_positive_rate
parameter_registry_parameters.rationale: Supports reactive inspection economics and unnecessary-cleaning sensitivity.
parameter_registry_parameters.source: DeepSolarEye and PV image-inspection literature; exact production CV model not yet selected.
parameter_registry_parameters.source_geography_and_climate: Mostly non-Saudi PV image datasets.

parameter_registry_parameters.applicability_to_saudi_conditions: Represents missed soiling defects under Saudi image conditions.
parameter_registry_parameters.limitations: Should be computed directly from the T2 confusion matrix when available.
parameter_registry_parameters.name: cv.false_negative_rate
parameter_registry_parameters.rationale: Allows downstream economics to price missed cleaning opportunities.
parameter_registry_parameters.source: Complement of provisional central-v2 CV recall range.
parameter_registry_parameters.source_geography_and_climate: Derived from provisional CV sensitivity inputs.

parameter_registry_parameters.applicability_to_saudi_conditions: Use only as a provisional severity-estimation error envelope.
parameter_registry_parameters.limitations: Requires measured labels from T2 image annotation or soiling-ratio ground truth.
parameter_registry_parameters.name: cv.severity_mae_fraction
parameter_registry_parameters.rationale: Bounds CV uncertainty when mapping detected coverage to cleaning decisions.
parameter_registry_parameters.source: PV image-estimated soiling severity literature; no selected T2 model yet.
parameter_registry_parameters.source_geography_and_climate: Generic PV image datasets, mainly outside Saudi Arabia.

parameter_registry_parameters.applicability_to_saudi_conditions: Heat, dust, and flight rules may reduce achievable inspection rate.
parameter_registry_parameters.limitations: Runtime config stores interval_days; annual survey equivalents depend on simulated days and weather cancellations.
parameter_registry_parameters.name: inspection.whole_farm_surveys_per_year
parameter_registry_parameters.rationale: Separates full-farm survey cadence from lower-level cohort inspection counts.
parameter_registry_parameters.source: T6 parameter audit correction, 2026-07-06; central annual survey cadence for whole-farm UAV inspection.
parameter_registry_parameters.source_geography_and_climate: Operational estimate, not climate-specific.

parameter_registry_parameters.applicability_to_saudi_conditions: Saudi heat, payload, wind, and battery aging can reduce practical duration.
parameter_registry_parameters.limitations: Future T2 hardware, image overlap, battery, and airspace constraints may change segment duration.
parameter_registry_parameters.name: inspection.drone_flight_duration_minutes
parameter_registry_parameters.rationale: Targets about 220 annual drone flight hours with 24 whole-farm survey equivalents.
parameter_registry_parameters.source: Operational flight-segment placeholder for central-v2 SolarClean comparison; not a manufacturer endurance limit.
parameter_registry_parameters.source_geography_and_climate: Manufacturer global specification; not hot-desert derated.

parameter_registry_parameters.applicability_to_saudi_conditions: Heat, dust, and flight rules may reduce achievable inspection hours.
parameter_registry_parameters.limitations: Requires T2 flight plan, image overlap, altitude, camera, and regulatory assumptions.
parameter_registry_parameters.name: inspection.drone_flight_hours_per_year_target
parameter_registry_parameters.rationale: Keeps annual drone workload visible separately from cohort-level inspection event counts.
parameter_registry_parameters.source: T6 parameter audit correction, 2026-07-06; central reactive inspection workload target.
parameter_registry_parameters.source_geography_and_climate: Operational estimate, not climate-specific.

parameter_registry_parameters.applicability_to_saudi_conditions: High ambient temperature may require extra charged packs or rest periods.
parameter_registry_parameters.limitations: Must be replaced by T2 flight-cycle and charger logistics.
parameter_registry_parameters.name: inspection.battery_sets_per_drone
parameter_registry_parameters.rationale: Supports future inspection throughput and equipment-cost sensitivity.
parameter_registry_parameters.source: Operational placeholder based on multi-flight daily UAV inspection workflows.
parameter_registry_parameters.source_geography_and_climate: Operational estimate, not climate-specific.

parameter_registry_parameters.applicability_to_saudi_conditions: Saudi heat, access lanes, water logistics, and labor rules may lower throughput.
parameter_registry_parameters.limitations: Needs vendor or site-specific time-and-motion data.
parameter_registry_parameters.name: cleaning.panels_per_worker_hour
parameter_registry_parameters.rationale: Provides a broad labor-throughput sensitivity for future cleaning dispatch.
parameter_registry_parameters.source: PV cleaning literature and field-practice envelope; no selected Saudi contractor quote.
parameter_registry_parameters.source_geography_and_climate: Manual or semi-manual PV cleaning operations in dry climates.

parameter_registry_parameters.applicability_to_saudi_conditions: Water scarcity makes this a high-priority Saudi sensitivity input.
parameter_registry_parameters.limitations: Depends on cleaning method, dust adhesion, panel size, and water recycling.
parameter_registry_parameters.name: cleaning.water_liters_per_panel
parameter_registry_parameters.rationale: Captures wet-cleaning water demand without implementing dispatch behavior.
parameter_registry_parameters.source: PV cleaning literature and arid-site water-use envelopes; water-free cleaning alternatives noted separately.
parameter_registry_parameters.source_geography_and_climate: Dry-climate PV cleaning evidence outside the exact Riyadh site.

parameter_registry_parameters.applicability_to_saudi_conditions: Saudi soiling severity and water scarcity make trigger sensitivity important.
parameter_registry_parameters.limitations: Should be optimized against validated economics and local soiling once T7/T8 data exist.
parameter_registry_parameters.name: cleaning.trigger_loss_fraction
parameter_registry_parameters.rationale: Documents the central 4% estimated-loss trigger used by the reactive controller.
parameter_registry_parameters.source: T6 parameter audit correction, 2026-07-06; reactive cleaning trigger for central comparison.
parameter_registry_parameters.source_geography_and_climate: Operational dispatch placeholder, not climate-specific.

parameter_registry_parameters.applicability_to_saudi_conditions: Heat stress and site access can increase Saudi labor hours.
parameter_registry_parameters.limitations: Requires T2 definition of cleaning action size.
parameter_registry_parameters.name: cleaning.labour_hours_per_action
parameter_registry_parameters.rationale: Allows future economics to price one targeted cleaning action.
parameter_registry_parameters.source: Operational placeholder derived from the absence of a T2 dispatch model.
parameter_registry_parameters.source_geography_and_climate: Operational estimate, not climate-specific.

parameter_registry_parameters.applicability_to_saudi_conditions: Material and application cost may differ in Saudi procurement.
parameter_registry_parameters.limitations: Requires installed coating quote, module area, application process, warranty, and replacement schedule.
parameter_registry_parameters.name: coating.capex_sar_per_m2
parameter_registry_parameters.rationale: Central-v2 installed CAPEX target is 350,000 SAR over 20,000 m2 coated area.
parameter_registry_parameters.source: Self-cleaning coating literature and commercial anti-soiling cost envelope; no selected vendor quote.
parameter_registry_parameters.source_geography_and_climate: Global coating literature, including arid PV motivation.

parameter_registry_parameters.applicability_to_saudi_conditions: Saudi procurement, labor, abrasion warranty, and access logistics may change installed cost.
parameter_registry_parameters.limitations: Requires product quote, application method, warranty, and field demonstration before decision use.
parameter_registry_parameters.name: coating.installed_capex_sar
parameter_registry_parameters.rationale: Documents the total installed central-v2 coating CAPEX consumed by the full-year T6 config.
parameter_registry_parameters.source: T6 parameter audit correction, 2026-07-06; installed front-surface anti-soiling coating cost target.
parameter_registry_parameters.source_geography_and_climate: Planning estimate for Saudi utility-scale PV, not a vendor quote.

parameter_registry_parameters.applicability_to_saudi_conditions: Used to keep the central coating case near a defensible residual-loss target while preserving sparse-rain physics.
parameter_registry_parameters.limitations: Must be replaced by coated-versus-uncoated field data for a selected product.
parameter_registry_parameters.name: coating.residual_annual_loss_target_fraction
parameter_registry_parameters.rationale: Documents the central coating residual annual loss target without hardcoding final annual output.
parameter_registry_parameters.source: T6 parameter audit correction, 2026-07-06; central residual-loss target for the front-surface anti-soiling coating case.
parameter_registry_parameters.source_geography_and_climate: Riyadh hot-arid planning target, not a measured coated-field result.

parameter_registry_parameters.applicability_to_saudi_conditions: Relevant to Saudi dust adhesion but needs local dust chemistry validation.
parameter_registry_parameters.limitations: Performance depends on abrasion, UV exposure, cleaning method, and dust particle properties. Endpoint-derived coated/uncoated power-loss ratios must not be combined with passive cleaning as if they were independent adhesion measurements.
parameter_registry_parameters.name: coating.dust_adhesion_reduction_fraction
parameter_registry_parameters.rationale: Represents a mechanistic 30% reduction in new dust accumulation; runtime multiplier is 1 - this value.
parameter_registry_parameters.source: Hydrophobic/nanotextured self-cleaning coating studies and arid PV coating reviews; not the paper endpoint ratio by itself.
parameter_registry_parameters.source_geography_and_climate: Lab and outdoor tests, not a Riyadh utility farm.

parameter_registry_parameters.applicability_to_saudi_conditions: Relevant to Saudi dust accumulation but requires local dust validation.
parameter_registry_parameters.limitations: Should be replaced by measured coated-versus-uncoated dust accumulation rates.
parameter_registry_parameters.name: coating.dust_accumulation_multiplier
parameter_registry_parameters.rationale: Stores the direct runtime multiplier used by CoatingPhysicsConfig.
parameter_registry_parameters.source: Calculated as 1 - coating.dust_adhesion_reduction_fraction for central-v2 T6 runtime configuration.
parameter_registry_parameters.source_geography_and_climate: Derived from the central-v2 anti-soiling coating assumption.

parameter_registry_parameters.applicability_to_saudi_conditions: Saudi high irradiance and heat make cooling potentially relevant.
parameter_registry_parameters.limitations: Must not be applied unless the selected coating has measured thermal behavior.
parameter_registry_parameters.name: coating.cell_temperature_reduction_c
parameter_registry_parameters.rationale: Central-v2 anti-soiling coating assumes no cooling benefit; cooling belongs in a separate R&D preset.
parameter_registry_parameters.source: Radiative-cooling and hydrogel PV-cooling literature; not yet tied to a selected coating.
parameter_registry_parameters.source_geography_and_climate: Hot-climate PV cooling studies, generally not Riyadh-specific.

parameter_registry_parameters.applicability_to_saudi_conditions: Night humidity and dust cementation can matter in Saudi sites.
parameter_registry_parameters.limitations: Requires local humidity/dew observations and coating surface-energy data.
parameter_registry_parameters.name: coating.dew_soiling_multiplier
parameter_registry_parameters.rationale: Keeps dew behavior explicit instead of hiding it inside coating effectiveness.
parameter_registry_parameters.source: PV soiling literature reports dew can either mobilize or cement dust depending on surface and climate.
parameter_registry_parameters.source_geography_and_climate: Arid and semi-arid PV soiling studies, not Riyadh-measured.

parameter_registry_parameters.applicability_to_saudi_conditions: Saudi UV, abrasion, and sand exposure may accelerate degradation.
parameter_registry_parameters.limitations: No selected product or Saudi abrasion test.
parameter_registry_parameters.name: coating.annual_degradation_fraction
parameter_registry_parameters.rationale: Ensures coating benefit can decay over its useful life in T3 scenarios.
parameter_registry_parameters.source: Coating durability literature and warranty-risk sensitivity placeholder.
parameter_registry_parameters.source_geography_and_climate: Global outdoor coating durability context.

parameter_registry_parameters.applicability_to_saudi_conditions: Optical penalty applies regardless of climate; dust abrasion may increase it.
parameter_registry_parameters.limitations: Weak-preset optical penalty is not a measured result from the named coating paper. Must use product- or module-specific relative coated-versus-uncoated PV performance once T3 selects a coating.
parameter_registry_parameters.name: coating.optical_penalty_fraction
parameter_registry_parameters.rationale: Central-v2 assumes near-neutral optical transmission; sensitivity allows modest losses up to 2%.
parameter_registry_parameters.source: Transparent coating literature and low-side sensitivity assumption; optical losses vary by material and application thickness. Absolute glass transmittance must not be used directly as a relative PV multiplier.
parameter_registry_parameters.source_geography_and_climate: Global coating optical tests.

parameter_registry_parameters.applicability_to_saudi_conditions: Optical effect applies regardless of climate, but Saudi abrasion may change it over life.
parameter_registry_parameters.limitations: Requires product- and module-specific relative coated-versus-uncoated PV measurements.
parameter_registry_parameters.name: coating.optical_relative_energy_effect_fraction
parameter_registry_parameters.rationale: Records the -1% to +2% optical sensitivity range while central runtime remains near neutral.
parameter_registry_parameters.source: T6 parameter audit correction, 2026-07-06; conservative optical sensitivity for transparent front-surface coating.
parameter_registry_parameters.source_geography_and_climate: Global coating optical tests, not a selected Riyadh product.

parameter_registry_parameters.applicability_to_saudi_conditions: Could matter in Saudi water-scarcity analysis but is technology-specific.
parameter_registry_parameters.limitations: Should remain zero unless T3 implements a coating with measured water capture and a collection system. The 0.128 L/m2/night paper value is favorable-condition collected water, not guaranteed nightly gross condensation.
parameter_registry_parameters.name: coating.water_collection_l_per_m2_day
parameter_registry_parameters.rationale: Central-v2 anti-soiling coating does not rely on humidity or water collection; water behavior belongs in an R&D preset.
parameter_registry_parameters.source: Hydrogel and atmospheric-water-harvesting PV concepts; not part of the current baseline physics.
parameter_registry_parameters.source_geography_and_climate: Hot-climate water-harvesting studies, not selected for Riyadh deployment.

parameter_registry_parameters.applicability_to_saudi_conditions: Saudi abrasion, cleaning method, and warranty inspections may alter annual reserve.
parameter_registry_parameters.limitations: Requires product-specific O&M and warranty terms before decision use.
parameter_registry_parameters.name: coating.annual_opex_reserve_sar_per_year
parameter_registry_parameters.rationale: Documents central-v2 annual coating OPEX reserve consumed by T6 economics.
parameter_registry_parameters.source: T6 parameter audit correction, 2026-07-06; coating inspection/maintenance reserve target.
parameter_registry_parameters.source_geography_and_climate: Planning estimate for Saudi utility-scale PV, not a vendor quote.

parameter_registry_parameters.applicability_to_saudi_conditions: Saudi UV, sand abrasion, and cleaning cycles can shorten coating life.
parameter_registry_parameters.limitations: Requires selected product warranty and abrasion testing.
parameter_registry_parameters.name: coating.useful_life_years
parameter_registry_parameters.rationale: Annualizes coating CAPEX over coating useful life instead of the generic 15-year economic horizon.
parameter_registry_parameters.source: T6 parameter audit correction, 2026-07-06; front-surface anti-soiling coating replacement interval.
parameter_registry_parameters.source_geography_and_climate: Outdoor coating durability context, not a selected Saudi product warranty.

parameter_registry_parameters.applicability_to_saudi_conditions: Directly relevant to Saudi economic valuation but customer category may differ.
parameter_registry_parameters.limitations: Tariffs can change and may depend on customer class, contract, and netting rules.
parameter_registry_parameters.name: economics.electricity_tariff_sar_per_kwh
parameter_registry_parameters.rationale: Central-v2 uses 0.18 SAR/kWh with sensitivity up to 0.30 SAR/kWh.
parameter_registry_parameters.source: Saudi electricity tariff references from SEC/WERA public tariff material; current tariff must be refreshed before decision use.
parameter_registry_parameters.source_geography_and_climate: Saudi Arabia national tariff context.

parameter_registry_parameters.applicability_to_saudi_conditions: Relevant but highly dependent on contractor, Saudization, and safety requirements.
parameter_registry_parameters.limitations: Should be replaced by project-specific labor and supervision rates.
parameter_registry_parameters.name: economics.labour_cost_sar_per_hour
parameter_registry_parameters.rationale: Supports O&M labor sensitivity until a contractor quote is available.
parameter_registry_parameters.source: Saudi labor-market wage references and cleaning-contractor uncertainty envelope.
parameter_registry_parameters.source_geography_and_climate: Saudi labor market, not a quoted solar-O&M contract.

parameter_registry_parameters.applicability_to_saudi_conditions: Water scarcity and delivery distance are directly relevant to Saudi cleaning decisions.
parameter_registry_parameters.limitations: NWC tariff may not equal delivered water cost for a remote utility farm.
parameter_registry_parameters.name: economics.water_cost_sar_per_m3
parameter_registry_parameters.rationale: Prices wet-cleaning water use in future economics.
parameter_registry_parameters.source: Saudi National Water Company tariff references and arid-site delivered-water uncertainty.
parameter_registry_parameters.source_geography_and_climate: Saudi water tariff context plus site delivery uncertainty.

parameter_registry_parameters.applicability_to_saudi_conditions: Saudi import, warranty, payload, and spares can shift total installed cost.
parameter_registry_parameters.limitations: Requires selected drone, camera payload, batteries, chargers, insurance, and spares.
parameter_registry_parameters.name: economics.drone_equipment_cost_sar
parameter_registry_parameters.rationale: Central-v2 reactive CV comparison uses a 150,000 SAR drone/camera/battery equipment CAPEX.
parameter_registry_parameters.source: Manufacturer-class UAV specification context and market-price sensitivity envelope; no binding quote.
parameter_registry_parameters.source_geography_and_climate: Global equipment market, Saudi procurement not quoted.

parameter_registry_parameters.applicability_to_saudi_conditions: Saudi heat, regulatory requirements, battery life, and staffing can change the rate.
parameter_registry_parameters.limitations: Requires T2 vendor quote and operations plan.
parameter_registry_parameters.name: economics.drone_flight_operation_cost_sar_per_hour
parameter_registry_parameters.rationale: Prices recorded reactive drone_flight_hours rather than leaving flight activity economically silent.
parameter_registry_parameters.source: T6 parameter audit correction, 2026-07-06; placeholder for pilot, battery-cycle, maintenance, and consumables per flight hour.
parameter_registry_parameters.source_geography_and_climate: Operational estimate, not climate-specific.

parameter_registry_parameters.applicability_to_saudi_conditions: Saudi staffing, insurance, maintenance, software, spares, and mobilization can change the overhead.
parameter_registry_parameters.limitations: Requires project-specific O&M quote before decision use.
parameter_registry_parameters.name: economics.reactive_overhead_opex_sar_per_year
parameter_registry_parameters.rationale: Prevents reactive supervision/software/maintenance overhead from being silently unpriced.
parameter_registry_parameters.source: T6 parameter audit correction, 2026-07-06; explicit annual OPEX target for reactive CV operations.
parameter_registry_parameters.source_geography_and_climate: Operational estimate, not climate-specific.

parameter_registry_parameters.applicability_to_saudi_conditions: Relevant to Saudi project economics but must be replaced by sponsor WACC.
parameter_registry_parameters.limitations: Does not include capital structure, inflation, tax, or policy incentives.
parameter_registry_parameters.name: economics.discount_rate_fraction
parameter_registry_parameters.rationale: Supports NPV sensitivity without overclaiming a financing model.
parameter_registry_parameters.source: Saudi Central Bank rate context and project-finance sensitivity practice.
parameter_registry_parameters.source_geography_and_climate: Saudi macro-finance context, not a project WACC quote.

parameter_registry_parameters.applicability_to_saudi_conditions: High heat and abrasion may shorten mitigation equipment life.
parameter_registry_parameters.limitations: T3 should split PV plant life, drone life, battery life, and coating life when implemented.
parameter_registry_parameters.name: economics.useful_life_years
parameter_registry_parameters.rationale: Provides a common horizon for coating, equipment, and O&M sensitivity.
parameter_registry_parameters.source: PV asset-life convention and mitigation-equipment sensitivity envelope.
parameter_registry_parameters.source_geography_and_climate: Generic project finance assumption, not climate-specific.

warnings.message: Comparison used weather.provider=fixture; decision use requires measured or refreshed weather.
Fixture weather is deterministic test data, not a Riyadh measurement.
Comparison period is not a full Jan 1-Dec 31 site-year; annual fields represent the configured period total and no economic recommendation may be produced.
Coating cost assumptions are provisional, not validated field costs.
Coating deployment remains provisional for field application.
economics.electricity_tariff_sar_per_kwh has status blocked; allow_blocked_with_warnings permits use for research/sensitivity only.
economics.labour_cost_sar_per_hour has status blocked; allow_blocked_with_warnings permits use for research/sensitivity only.
economics.water_cost_sar_per_m3 has status blocked; allow_blocked_with_warnings permits use for research/sensitivity only.
economics.drone_equipment_cost_sar has status blocked; allow_blocked_with_warnings permits use for research/sensitivity only.
economics.drone_flight_operation_cost_sar_per_hour has status provisional; allow_blocked_with_warnings permits use for research/sensitivity only.
economics.reactive_overhead_opex_sar_per_year has status provisional; allow_blocked_with_warnings permits use for research/sensitivity only.
economics.discount_rate_fraction has status blocked; allow_blocked_with_warnings permits use for research/sensitivity only.
economics.useful_life_years has status blocked; allow_blocked_with_warnings permits use for research/sensitivity only.
